response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most recent work focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in non-financial contexts; while there is brief historical C++ exposure from 2014–2015, it is outdated and not aligned with the mandatory domain or platform requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated experience with CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No recent or demonstrable C++ development on Windows platform
Lacks any proven experience in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or enterprise databases like SQL Server/Oracle
